name: React Router
description: A standard routing library for React applications that enables navigation between views, URL parameter handling, and nested route layouts. React Router provides both client-side and server-side routing capabilities with support for loaders, actions, and data fetching.
advantages: Declarative routing with nested route configuration
Data loading and mutation with loaders and actions
Strong TypeScript support with type-safe route params
disadvantages: API changes across major versions require migration effort
Can be overkill for simple applications with few pages
Learning curve for advanced patterns like nested routes and data loaders
